## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Vanilla parity update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or maintenance

## Affected Areas

- [ ] `blocksandstuff-common`
- [ ] `blocksandstuff-blocks`
- [ ] `blocksandstuff-fluids`
- [ ] `testserver`
- [ ] Build, publishing, or CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant tests.
- [ ] I manually verified the behavior where tests are not enough.
- [ ] I updated or added tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I documented skipped verification below.

## Compatibility

- [ ] This change is backward compatible.
- [ ] This change includes an intentional breaking change.
- [ ] This change depends on a specific Minestom, Java, Kotlin, or Gradle version.

## AI Usage And Review

As described in our contribution guidelines, we allow the use of AI tools to assist with development. However, any AI-generated code must be thoroughly
reviewed by you, the contributor. Also, you need to disclose how you used AI tools, if any.

- [ ] I did not use AI assistance for this change.
- [ ] I used AI assistance and disclosed how below.
  - [ ] Any AI-generated code has been thoroughly reviewed by a human, or remains marked as unreviewed.
